← The Foundations

The Foundations · Keep the books

Pricing

The step up from the basics: price your work to be both fair and sustainable — values and math together — and walk out with a real offer built on your own numbers.

90 minutes · live, small group (the step-up class — expect to work)

What we'll cover

  • The real cost of doing business, so you never price at a loss
  • Pricing models — hourly, project, value-based — and which fits
  • Bringing your values and your numbers together
  • Building an offer you can say out loud with confidence

What you'll walk out with

A real offer, priced on your own numbers.

Know before you go

Comes alive once your books and numbers are roughly in order.

The Foundations open this fall (2026). Be first to hear — and grab a free hour in the meantime — at Coffee with Quinta.

Join the waitlist Start free: Coffee with Quinta

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Pricing for?

Women founders whose business is up and running and who want to strengthen this part of it. It's part of The Foundations, the plain-language business fundamentals track.

2

Do I need any experience?

Comes alive once your books and numbers are roughly in order.

3

What will I walk out with?

A real offer, priced on your own numbers. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

Enrollment opens Fall 2026. Join the waitlist at quintaand.co/waitlist to hear first — and the free monthly Coffee with Quinta is open in the meantime.

Quinta & Co.

Practical business & AI education · Dallas, Texas & online

Quinta & Co. classes are educational and are not legal, tax, financial, or HR/employment advice. For decisions about your specific situation, please consult a qualified professional.
